Hero.title: Creating content for a digital world
Hero.lead: DORWA is a full-service creative studio based in Algeria. We help brands stand out through cinematic content, sharp storytelling, and design that doesn't blink first.

Workflows.title: From a blank page to a finished frame
Workflows.lead: Three phases. One team. End-to-end delivery for video, social, 3D, design, and web.
Workflows.discoverBody: We start by understanding your brand, your audience, and the message you actually want to land — not the brief you copied from someone else.
Workflows.produceBody: Our directors, cinematographers, 3D artists, and designers turn the plan into work you can show your boss. Or your customers. Or your mom.
Workflows.deliverBody: Edits, exports, platform crops, motion variants — delivered ready to ship, in the formats your channels actually need.

Services.title: Five services. One studio.
Services.lead: Production excellence from pre to post — and everything between.

video.title: Video Production
video.blurb: Cinematic commercials, brand films, and event coverage trusted by major Algerian companies.

social.title: Social Media
social.blurb: Platform-native content built for the scroll — short-form video, reels, and series that grow audiences.

3d.title: 3D & Animation
3d.blurb: Product visualizations, architectural walkthroughs, and motion graphics that explain what a photo can't.

design.title: Graphic Design
design.blurb: Modern branding across digital and print — identities, campaigns, and collateral that look like 2026.

web.title: Web Design
web.blurb: Responsive, fast, and built to convert. Sites that feel as good as the content you put on them.

Testimonials.title: What clients say
Testimonials.lead: A small selection of voices from the people we've worked with across Algeria.

Cta.title: Let's tell your story
Cta.lead: From a single TikTok to a full brand campaign — we'd love to hear what you're working on.

About.title: Unleashing creativity in the Valley of the Sun
About.intro: Born in Hassi Messaoud and working across all of Algeria, DORWA is a team of producers, directors, cinematographers, 3D artists, and designers obsessed with one thing: making content people actually stop to watch.
About.missionBody: Help brands cut through the noise with stories worth telling, told well. We bring big-studio production thinking to local-market budgets, and we ship.
About.teamLead: Six creatives. One studio. Each role earned, not titled.

ServicesPage.title: Comprehensive production excellence
ServicesPage.lead: We understand each project is unique. From pre-production planning through on-set execution to the meticulous details of post — we own the whole pipeline.

Work.title: Recent projects
Work.lead: A snapshot of recent films, campaigns, and brand content we've shipped. Click any project to play.

Contact.title: Tell us what you're working on
Contact.lead: Drop a line and we'll come back within one business day. For faster turnaround, WhatsApp is the fastest channel.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: We're launching a new product in September and need a campaign film + 3 social cuts.
Contact.successBody: Thanks — we'll get back to you within one business day.
Contact.errorBody: Something went wrong. Please try WhatsApp or email instead.
